title: Inventory and Control of Enterprise Assets (IG1)
description: Implements the IG1 safeguards of CIS Control 1 — Inventory and Control of Enterprise Assets. Establishes the essential cyber-hygiene baseline for this control area.

tasks.title: Implement IG1 safeguards for Control 1
tasks.description: Put in place the IG1 safeguards for Inventory and Control of Enterprise Assets (1.1, 1.2).

tasks.title: Review Control 1 coverage
tasks.description: Periodically verify that the IG1 safeguards for Inventory and Control of Enterprise Assets remain effective and update as the environment changes.
